name: Futa Town of Carloom
description:
The war between the oppressing man from Mannheim and the revolting Futanari has finally come to a end, after years of bloodshed.

As a result of the peace treaty, the new nation of Futaheim was founded, where the Futanari build a future for themselves.

You are a child of refugees, who fled from the war and you just return to your hometown of Carloom , which is part of the Futanari nation now.

<><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><><>

Go from here and play your life in Carloom, or head out and explore the lands.

Fair warning, heavy futanari focus here and game is meant for male pov, but should work with every gender.

Have fun~
creator: KSFemboy
